title: Build e-commerce reseller application with product catalog and order management

requirements.text: Create a product catalog page displaying products with images, names, prices, and stock status in a mobile-optimized grid layout
acceptanceCriteria: Products display in a responsive grid on mobile and tablet devices
Each product card shows image, name, price, and availability status
Grid layout adapts to different screen sizes

requirements.text: Implement backend data model for products including id, name, description, price, stock quantity, category, and image reference
acceptanceCriteria: Product type is defined with all required fields
Products can be stored and retrieved from stable storage
Query methods exist for listing all products and retrieving individual products

requirements.text: Create product detail page showing full product information, larger image, description, and quantity selector
acceptanceCriteria: Users can tap a product from the catalog to view details
Detail page displays full product description and specifications
Quantity selector allows users to choose purchase quantity

requirements.text: Implement shopping cart functionality allowing users to add products, adjust quantities, and view cart total
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add products to cart from product detail page
Cart persists items and quantities during session
Cart displays running total of all items
Users can modify quantities or remove items from cart

requirements.text: Create order management system in backend to store orders with customer information, ordered items, quantities, total amount, and order status
acceptanceCriteria: Order type includes customer details, line items, total, timestamp, and status
Orders are stored in stable storage
Methods exist to create new orders and retrieve order history
Order status can be tracked (pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered)

requirements.text: Build checkout flow allowing users to review cart, enter shipping information, and place orders
acceptanceCriteria: Checkout page displays cart summary with all items and total
Form collects shipping name, address, phone number
Users can confirm and submit orders
Order confirmation is displayed after successful submission

requirements.text: Create order history page displaying past orders with order details, status, and items purchased
acceptanceCriteria: Users can view list of their previous orders
Each order shows date, status, total amount
Users can tap to view detailed order information
Order status is clearly indicated with visual indicators

requirements.text: Implement product search and category filtering to help users find products quickly
acceptanceCriteria: Search bar allows text-based product search
Category filters narrow product listings
Search and filter results update catalog display in real-time
Backend provides efficient query methods for search and filtering

requirements.text: Add inventory management capability for resellers to track stock levels and receive low-stock alerts
acceptanceCriteria: Stock quantity decrements when orders are placed
Out-of-stock products are clearly marked and cannot be ordered
Dashboard shows current inventory levels
Visual indicators highlight low-stock products

requirements.text: Render generated product images as static assets in the frontend public directory
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated
Product catalog and detail pages reference images from static assets
Images load correctly on all device sizes

constraints: Respect single-actor architecture for all Motoko backend logic
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (hooks/useInternetIdentity, hooks/useActor, main.tsx, components/ui)
Use only React, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn, and React Query for frontend implementation
nonGoals: Payment processing integration (Stripe or other payment gateways)
Real-time inventory synchronization with external systems

required: Modern e-commerce hero banner showing shopping concept with clean geometric shapes (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Sample product image for electronics category - smartphone (product-phone.dim_400x400.png)
Sample product image for electronics category - laptop (product-laptop.dim_400x400.png)
Sample product image for accessories category - headphones (product-headphones.dim_400x400.png)
Sample product image for accessories category - smartwatch (product-watch.dim_400x400.png)
Shopping cart icon illustration in minimalist style (cart-icon.dim_128x128.png)
